'''ngochafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jellied|jellied]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jellied|jellied]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngochafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochafithi|ngochafithi]] || [[word:ngochafiji|ngochafiji]] || [[word:ngochafishi|ngochafishi]] || [[word:ngochafiki|ngochafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochafuthuthu|ngochafuthuthu]] || [[word:ngochafujuju|ngochafujuju]] || [[word:ngochafushushu|ngochafushushu]] || [[word:ngochafukuku|ngochafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochafuthu|ngochafuthu]] || [[word:ngochafuju|ngochafuju]] || [[word:ngochafushu|ngochafushu]] || [[word:ngochafuku|ngochafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochafufthuf|ngochafufthuf]] || [[word:ngochafufjuf|ngochafufjuf]] || [[word:ngochafufshuf|ngochafufshuf]] || [[word:ngochafufkuf|ngochafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochafethe|ngochafethe]] || [[word:ngochafeje|ngochafeje]] || [[word:ngochafeshe|ngochafeshe]] || [[word:ngochafeke|ngochafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochafothotho|ngochafothotho]] || [[word:ngochafojojo|ngochafojojo]] || [[word:ngochafoshosho|ngochafoshosho]] || [[word:ngochafokoko|ngochafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochafotho|ngochafotho]] || [[word:ngochafojo|ngochafojo]] || [[word:ngochafosho|ngochafosho]] || [[word:ngochafoko|ngochafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochafofthof|ngochafofthof]] || [[word:ngochafofjof|ngochafofjof]] || [[word:ngochafofshof|ngochafofshof]] || [[word:ngochafofkof|ngochafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochafĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochafĂŠthĂŠ|ngochafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochafĂŠjĂŠ|ngochafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochafĂŠshĂŠ|ngochafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochafĂŠkĂŠ|ngochafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochafathatha|ngochafathatha]] || [[word:ngochafajaja|ngochafajaja]] || [[word:ngochafashasha|ngochafashasha]] || [[word:ngochafakaka|ngochafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochafatha|ngochafatha]] || [[word:ngochafaja|ngochafaja]] || [[word:ngochafasha|ngochafasha]] || [[word:ngochafaka|ngochafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochafafthaf|ngochafafthaf]] || [[word:ngochafafjaf|ngochafafjaf]] || [[word:ngochafafshaf|ngochafafshaf]] || [[word:ngochafafkaf|ngochafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngochafasha|ngochafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochafshĂ«asha|ngochafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochafroasha|ngochafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochafmuasha|ngochafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochafyaasha|ngochafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochafnkshĂ«asha|gongochafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochafnkroasha|gongochafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochafnkmuasha|gongochafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochafnkyaasha|gongochafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngochachafasha|ngochachafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochachafshĂ«asha|ngochachafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochachafroasha|ngochachafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochachafmuasha|ngochachafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochachafyaasha|ngochachafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochachafnkshĂ«asha|gongochachafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochachafnkroasha|gongochachafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochachafnkmuasha|gongochachafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochachafnkyaasha|gongochachafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngechĂŠfasha|ngechĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngechĂŠfshĂ«asha|ngechĂŠfshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngechĂŠfroasha|ngechĂŠfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngechĂŠfmuasha|ngechĂŠfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngechĂŠfyaasha|ngechĂŠfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongechĂŠfnkshĂ«asha|gongechĂŠfnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongechĂŠfnkroasha|gongechĂŠfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongechĂŠfnkmuasha|gongechĂŠfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongechĂŠfnkyaasha|gongechĂŠfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngochfafasha|ngochfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochfafshĂ«asha|ngochfafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochfafroasha|ngochfafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochfafmuasha|ngochfafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochfafyaasha|ngochfafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochfafnkshĂ«asha|gongochfafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochfafnkroasha|gongochfafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochfafnkmuasha|gongochfafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochfafnkyaasha|gongochfafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
